title: alyssum shortii
intro: Alyssum shortii, also known as Short's Alyssum, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties that help in relieving coughs and congestion. The health benefits of Alyssum shortii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic to treat wounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
